feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Requirement of purchasing document in Manage supplier Line item
entry.content:
Dear Expert ,

This incident is with reference of incident no :- 293084/2026 Updated on 18.03.2026 where we have asked replicating purchasing document number in Manage Supplier Line item which as per SAP is not possible. But our client is not accepting this resolution that you have discarded this option. Please let us know how we can fetch purchasing Document in Manage Supplier Line Item. Refer to the attachment.

Regards,

Shatabdi

entry.title: How to dynamically determine Warehouse Source Storage Type by Customer for the same material code
entry.content:
Hi

A single material code is being sold to multiple customers (A, B, C).

We want to store and pick this material from separate Storage Types assigned to each customer (e.g., ST_A, ST_B, ST_C).

However, only one Stock Removal Control Indicator can be set in the Material Master.

In this case, is there a way to dynamically determine the source storage type and bin when a Warehouse Order is created based on an Outbound Delivery?

For example, can we ensure that the source storage type and bin are determined as "ST_A" for Customer A, and "ST_B" for Customer B?

entry.title: SAP Document AI – Quality Certificate processed successfully but Certificate Receipt remains in “Exp
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

 

I am working on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition scenario
“AI-assisted processing of incoming supplier quality certificates with SAP Document AI”.

 

Current setup:
- AI Units are procured
- Business catalog QM – Incoming Quality Certificates (SAP_QM_BC_INCG_QLTY_CERT_PC) is assigned
- Scope item 7TC (Integration with SAP Document AI) is activated
- SAP Document AI tenant is accessible
- Certificate Receipt is created automatically at Goods Receipt with status = Expected

 

What I have done:
1. Posted Goods Receipt – Certificate Receipt created in Manage Certificate Receipts (F3233) with status Expected
2. Uploaded the supplier quality certificate PDF in SAP Document AI using:
   - Document Type: Custom
   - Schema: SAP_OCROnly_schema
3. Document AI processing completes successfully and shows status = Done

 

Issue:
Even after successful processing in SAP Document AI, the Certificate Receipt in SAP S/4HANA Cloud remains in “Expected” status and is not automatically updated to “Received”.
The document is not automatically attached to the Certificate Receipt.

 

Questions:
1. Is automatic update of Certificate Receipt (Expected → Received) the expected behavior in this scenario?
2. Is manual confirmation in Manage Certificate Receipts (F3233) the standard SAP-supported fallback if automatic matching does not occur?
3. Does the automatic update require uploading the document specifically via the app “Upload Quality Certificate Documents (F8858)” instead of uploading through the SAP Document AI portal?
4. If the “Upload Quality Certificate Documents (F8858)” app is used and it is not available in the SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library, how can access to this app be obtained in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
5.  Are there any additional configuration or prerequisites required to enable automatic linkage between SAP Document AI and Certificate Receipts?

 

Looking for confirmation from experts who have implemented or tested this scenario.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Romanian DSPL 394 – XML Errors
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working with the Romanian report “Statement 394 (DSPL)” and I am getting this error in the XML file, which I haven’t been able to fix:

<op1 tip="AI" tip_partener="2" ... />

It seems that SAP is marking the partner as tip_partener = 2, and ANAF rejects operations A and AI. Therefore, this is invalid for ANAF.

And another error with this block with this code:

<rezumat1 tip_partener="2" cota="21" facturiA="1" facturiAI="1" ... />

If tip_partener = 2, there cannot be facturiA or facturiAI.

From what I have checked, the issue seems to be in the Business Partner master data, because SAP continues classifying the Business Partner as a natural person.

I have reviewed the Business Partner and it has:

  • Country = RO
  • BP is marked as Organization
  • The tax identification seems correct: RO13279412

    Could you please help me?

    I am attaching the XML of the Romanian 394 report generated by the system.

    Thank you!

entry.title: GSTR6 - No items to report;Query DOC_SEL did not return any data
entry.content:
We create a new run for Goods and Service Tax Return 6 (GSTR 6) report but after successful run of task no attachments are generating.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Order A2X OData V4 — Does a deep insert POST roll back entirely if one line item fails?
entry.content: When creating a sales order with header and line items in a single deep insert POST using the Sales Order (A2X) OData V4 API, what is the default behavior if one line item fails validation — is the entire request rolled back (all or nothing), or can the header be saved with the valid items? Is this behavior configurable without a BAdI? Communication scenario SAP_COM_0109

entry.title: Need to have a seperate flexible workflow for PO amendments
entry.content:
Dear All

We need to setup seperate flexible workflow for PO amendments with different approvers and same preconditions.

I am not able find a solution using standard configuration.

Kindly advice in this regard

Regards

Suddy

entry.title: Workflow for journal entries in Public cloud sap
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

Greetings for the day.

Currently, the workflow is being triggered based on the approvers maintained in Manage Teams and Responsibilities. However, the business would like the workflow to be triggered based on the WBS element with multiple approvers.

We are not able to find the “Agent Determination by BAdI” option in the Manage Workflows for Verify Journal Entries app.

Could you please let us know if there is any solution available where we can use a BAdI for agent determination by passing the manage teams app?

Thanks.

entry.title: App - Accumulation Detail At Document Level
entry.content:
Exemption dates and how users can run this Accumulation Detail At Document Level app report for Supplier Exemption certificate and details.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issues setting the Lexicographical Flag for Material Numbers
entry.content:
We are unable to set the Lexicographical Flag for material master data in the Central Business Configuration under "Define Output Format of Material Numbers." We are encountering error BMG265, as shown in the attached document.

Following Note 3516603, we successfully archived several numeric materials in the Development environment. However, two specific numeric materials (2 and DIGITS) remain open and are proving difficult to archive. These materials are not needed and can be deleted or destroyed.

Since we have not yet created any materials in the Test and Production environment, could you support us to force the flag at the customizing level? 

We need your support as we cannot create the correct material master data.

We are unable to archive the materials in our system S4HANA Public Cloud. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to create the DO from old Delivery Schedule in SalesScheduleAgreement
entry.content:
Customer using the Sales Schedule Agreement with the process below 

Example 

  1. Date 01.04.2026 Create the JITDelivery Schedule Version 1 with Schedule Line date AAA
  2. Date 03.04.2026 Create the JIT Delivery Schedule Version 2 with Schedule Line date BBB
  3. Date 05.04.2026 Create the JIT Delivery Schedule Version 3 with Schedule Line date CCC

After that

     4. On the Date 20.04.2026, the user wants to create the Delivery Order with JIT Delivery Schedule Version 1 with Schedule Line date AAA

     5. On the Date 25.04.2026, the user wants to create the Delivery Order with JIT Delivery Schedule Version 2 with Schedule Line date BBB

     6. On the Date 30.04.2026, the user wants to create the Delivery Order with JIT Delivery Schedule Version 3 with Schedule Line date CCC

 

Question

How to create the Delivery Order from the old Delivery Schedule Version in the Sales Schedule Agreement?

entry.title: Prices aren’t being determined in sales orders in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We have been encountering an error in pricing determination, even though all prices have been maintained in VK1 (“Set Material Prices – Sales”), which is used to manage price master data.

Despite maintaining all required pricing data in the master records and ensuring that customer data is fully updated, prices are still not being determined in sales orders.

Additionally, header data such as Incoterms, Incoterms Location 1, and the Pricing Date are not being copied to the line items.

Furthermore, even though condition records have been maintained in the VK1 “Manage Prices – Sales” app, the corresponding condition types and rates are not being automatically applied.

 

Regards,
Tushar

entry.title: Batch Creation not happening in app F1796 App
entry.content:
Hi Team,

After the recent maintenance activity on 18th Apr, we have been facing issue wrt batch creation -

  • Batch generation is not possible for inbound deliveries created against Purchase Orders using App F1706 – system is only processing it (no error no failures)
  • The system does not allow batch creation or determination, even though:
    • The material is batch managed.
    • The process is standard SAP.
    • We have been using same materials from past 1 year and there is no change in batch configuration or master change to these materials.
  • This issue occurs across all PO-based inbound deliveries, not limited to production server, issue remains in QA and development server also.
  • It was running fine until 18th Apr (8pm IST)

When we perform inbound deliveries for goods receipt against Production Orders for EWM linked SLoc using:

App: Change Inbound Deliveries – Production

We are able to:

Edit the inbound delivery.

Successfully generate and assign batches for the batch-managed materials.

 

Can someone pls help understand what this issue is ?

entry.title: ILM Data Retrieval De-Archiving Options in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

We would like to clarify the available options in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition regarding the possibility of restoring or de-archiving data managed through Information Lifecycle Management (ILM).

Specifically, we would like to understand whether it is possible to recover archived data back into the active system in exceptional scenarios, such as audit requirements or cases where data has been archived unintentionally.

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Refinitiv Feed Update: Modifying exchange rate feeds for GBP/GIP and related currency conversions.
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Regarding exchange rate type 'M': Is it possible to provide a daily Refinitiv feed for GBP to EUR, CHF, and USD, as well as GIP to those same currencies, for the KPMG project?

Impacting Business :- 

The lack of accurate exchange rate feeds is impacting our financial integrity. Specifically, it leads to inaccurate Reporting in local currencies and causes errors during Foreign Currency Valuation (FCV) at month-end. This could result in significant unrealised gains or losses being recorded incorrectly

As this is a daily requirement, we want to move away from manual updates. We would appreciate your guidance on how to adjust the Refinitiv feed or implement an alternative automated method to handle these rates


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to set Order price qty tolerance B1/B2 in public cloud or change setting of Message no. M7028?
entry.content:
Hi

I used price units in the purchase order and set unlimited over-delivery,  but when I posted and manually entered the Qty in PO Price Unit, the following error occurred: Shortfall below order price quantity amounting to more than 50.00 %
Message no. M7028

 

 

 

I tried the following methods, but none worked:
1. In the IMG of the public cloud, I could not find the similar configuration as in OP: Materials Management - >Inventory Management and Physical Inventory -> Goods Receipt - >Set Tolerance Limits, so I could not set the tolerance for B1/B2.
2. In Define Attributes of System Messages, there is no message number M7028, and the public cloud does not allow creating new entries, so I cannot manually add M7028 and set it to W.

How can this issue be resolved in the public cloud?

Kindly advise.

Regards

entry.title: G/L does not exist in company Code during Automatic Payment Run and Bank Reconciliation
entry.content:
We have a problem with the G/L Account masking in the Account Symbol in Make Global Settings in Electronic Bank Statement in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud 2602 Version. When doing payment run and reprocess bank statement items. It does not capture the right G/L set on the Bank Determination and as Bank Subaccount. The current set up of our G/L is 8 characters long and we have this as pattern to our bank G/L

  1. Main Bank Account- 1020++++
  2. Incoming G/L Account-1021++++
  3. Outgoing G/L Account- 1022++++

As part of agreement with the client, we have decided that the last 4 digits is the last four digits of the account number in bank. 


Here are the confiugration made: 

1. Bank Determination- set up the G/L 10220012 as bank subaccount for the house bank

 

2. Make Global Settings for Electronic Bank Statement- Account Symbol masking 1022++++

 

However in the payment run, the G/L captured is entirely different. 

 

 

Can you help us with the right masking and what is the right behavior for this?

entry.title: Custom Validation not working for create incoming invoices App
entry.content:
User needs to display the warning message while posting if the amount entered in Amount is greater than 50,00,000 INR in following applications - create supplier invoice, create supplier invoice – Advanced, create incoming invoices.
Validation is working as expected in the "Create Supplier Invoice" App with "MRM_CHECK_INVOICE_CLOUD" Extension point, we're unable to find the accurate Extension point for "Create Incoming Invoices" & "Create Supplier Invoice - Advance" App.

entry.title: Create supplier invoice app and import supplier invoice app does not flow to DRC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We noticed that when we use "Create Supplier Invoice" app and "Import Supplier Invoice" app to create the Finance invoices, it doesn't flow to SAP DRC.

However, it is working fine if using "Create Incoming Invoices" app. For MM invoices from "Create Supplier Invoice -Advanced" app, there is no issue as well. It is able to flow to SAP DRC.

Anyone has any thoughts?

Thanks!

entry.title: G/L Accounts Mass Change of Company Code Data not possible
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

In the “Manage G/L Account Master Data” app, in the company code view, I can no longer perform mass changes as usual. Here is an example where I want to change the field status group:

I select G/L accounts and click the “Mass Change” and “Other Attributes” buttons.

 

But my accounts aren't showing up below.

 

In the chart of accounts view and the controlling area view, it works as usual.

Does anyone know what might have happened? In various other systems I have access to (starter, demo, and implementation systems), it also works in the company code view.

Thanks in advance for any tips!

Best regards,

Rado
